ValidationRule.description: Anchor records must be either date-anchored (Month + Day populated, Sort Order blank) OR evergreen (Sort Order populated, Month + Day blank). Partial dates, double-anchored records, and orphan records are not allowed.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: OR( AND( OR(ISBLANK(Month__c), ISBLANK(Day__c)), NOT(AND(ISBLANK(Month__c), ISBLANK(Day__c))) ), AND( NOT(ISBLANK(Month__c)), NOT(ISBLANK(Day__c)), NOT(ISBLANK(Sort_Order__c)) ), AND( ISBLANK(Month__c), ISBLANK(Day__c), ISBLANK(Sort_Order__c) ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Anchor records must be either date-anchored (Month + Day populated, Sort Order blank) OR evergreen (Sort Order populated, Month + Day blank). Partial dates, double-anchored records, and orphan records are not allowed.
